name: bluetoken
description: See the freshwater consumed by data centers to power your AI assistant. Works with Cursor, Copilot, and any AI tool. Track any response with one shortcut.

commands.title: BlueToken: Track AI Response (selection or clipboard)
BlueToken: Refresh Usage From Editor Data
BlueToken: Diagnose (for bugs on other machines)

chatParticipants.name: bluetoken
chatParticipants.description: Ask any question. BlueToken forwards it to the AI and tracks freshwater usage.

enumDescriptions: Scope 1 only: on-site data center cooling water (what companies officially report)
Scope 1+2: comprehensive; adds indirect water from electricity generation (recommended)
bluetoken.scope.description: Which water scope to measure. Scope 1+2 is the honest full-cost figure.

bluetoken.units.description: Display unit for water amounts. 'auto' picks the most readable unit based on quantity.

bluetoken.showInStatusBar.description: Show water usage in the VSCode status bar.

bluetoken.modelRateOverrides.description: Override water rates (mL per token) for specific models. E.g.: { "gpt-4o": 0.005 }

bluetoken.showComparison.description: Show real-world water comparisons (e.g. 'equals N drops') alongside mL values.

bluetoken.trackCursorChat.description: Automatically track EXACT token usage from Cursor's chat by reading Cursor's local database (read-only). No data leaves your machine.

bluetoken.trackCopilotChat.description: Automatically track GitHub Copilot chat by reading the editor's saved chat sessions and estimating tokens from the text.

bluetoken.trackAntigravityChat.description: Automatically track EXACT token usage from Antigravity by decoding Protobuf gen_metadata in ~/.gemini/antigravity-ide/conversations/*.db (read-only).

enumDescriptions: Recommended: only count generated (output) tokens; matches what the model wrote, not the whole prompt/context
Output tokens + only NEW context growth (includes file/tool dumps into context)
Sum full context size on every step (raw API billing; numbers look much higher)
bluetoken.antigravityCountMode.description: How Antigravity token totals are computed from gen_metadata.

enumDescriptions: Recommended: only count Copilot outputTokens from chat metadata
Output + new promptTokens growth between turns
Sum full promptTokens + outputTokens every turn (very high)
bluetoken.copilotCountMode.description: How Copilot chat token totals are computed from local session files.

bluetoken.pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) BlueToken reads the editor's chat databases to update usage.
